name: superset-devin-demo
description: GitHub Action that spawns a Devin session when an issue is labeled 'devin'. Devin opens a PR against this repo.

scripts.docker:spawn: docker run --rm --env-file .env -e ISSUE_NUMBER -e ISSUE_TITLE -e ISSUE_BODY -e ISSUE_URL -e TARGET_REPO -e UPSTREAM_REPO superset-devin-demo
